productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Hydroterra Shandal Black Sports Shoes
description: The adidas men's Hydroterra Shandal Water shoe is a hybrid mixture of a shoe, to protect and support your foot, while giving the ventilation and comfort of a sandal. Designed to go with you anywhere, this amphibious shoe is a high performer in all weather conditions and just perfect for all kinds of outdoor adventures. Even the lacing is practical & ndash the easy to tighten system has a toggle which you can slide to release or grip the cord. Upper Airmesh upper with synthetic overlays Cord lacing construction with toggle for fast and snug lacing and lace bungee to hold excess out of the way Heel-Fit-system for increased comfort and fit Molded EVA tongue for solid support Molded EVA sockliner to fit to your foot, sockliner and insole won't absorb water making them perfect for wet conditions Ergonomic insole to enhance comfort, removable to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Molded EVA midsole Outsole Speed Grip rubber for optimal grip on wet or dry terrains Shoe care Remove dirt with a damp cloth
